testCases.title: Share List via Email
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Email share option available in share modal
testCases.notes: No email share functionality found in the UI. The share mechanism is the Settings dialog Sharing options dropdown (Private / Anyone (readonly) / Organization) which generates a copyable link only. No separate Share modal with Email recipient field exists. This is a test-case authoring discrepancy vs actual storefront implementation — not a product defect. Share URL lives inside Settings dialog per project memory (by design).

testCases.title: Move Product Between Lists
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Move option available in product context menu
testCases.notes: No Move to... or product context menu exists in the list item UI. Each line item only provides image, product name/link, properties, price, variations link, quantity stepper, Add to Cart, and a Remove from list button. Moving a product between lists is not implemented as a distinct UI action in the current storefront version.

testCases.title: List View - Pagination or Load More for Large Lists
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Products beyond the initial page/batch visible after Load More or scroll
testCases.notes: Precondition not met: Summer 2026 list has only 3 items (< 10 required to trigger pagination or load-more). Seeding 8+ additional products to a list within the session scope is not feasible. Test requires a pre-seeded large list fixture.

testCases.title: Shared List - Remove Shared Access
testCases.failedAssertion: [STATE] After changing to Private: list removed from User B view
testCases.notes: Could not switch from John Mitchell back to Emily Johnson (list owner) due to account-menu popup logout button being intercepted by the QA environment indicator overlay at the top of the viewport in Firefox. The equivalent Privacy toggle + access revocation flow was fully verified and passed in B2C-LIST-011 (Private to Shared and back, old share link returned 404 after reverting to Private).
